modules.note: GAP-FILL money path: tip can SMS ADAM_SMS_NUMBER via Twilio without mounting full phone stack. Used to ping founder with preview/checkout + Connect captcha asks.

LifeOS Personal Finance API. The finance router was defined but never mounted in the founder-builder runtime lane, so the dashboard's GET /api/v1/lifeos/finance/goals returned 404 — surfaced by SENTRY lifeos-founder-ui finding no_js_errors (Error loading goals: HTTP 404). Mounted here via auto-register (no composition-root edit) so the dashboard goals/summary/accounts calls resolve. Fixes SENTRY defect #1 (rank 8).

GAP-FILL: LifeOS Engine (Google Calendar connect/sync, calendar events, outreach) 404'd on tip because Railway boots founder_builder only and never runs the full-runtime mount. Same auto-register pattern as finance/core. Unblocks Connect → Google Calendar for LifeOS, LifeRe scheduling context, and MarketingOS/SocialMediaOS shared Google OAuth app.
LifeOS core APIs (commitments + dashboard/scoreboard). Dashboard loadMITs/loadScores 404'd in founder lane — SENTRY lifeos-founder-ui no_js_errors. Auto-register mounts without composition-root edit.
Daily briefing API. Dashboard loadCalendar() calls GET /api/v1/lifeos/briefing/today — was 404 in founder lane.
GAP-FILL: never-stop authored AB subject routes (step-03) but tip would stay unreachable without auto-register. Mounts /api/site-builder/ab-subject/* for first-dollar subject testing.
GAP-FILL first-dollar: Site Builder BUILD_QUEUE step-4 was blocked forever (route module not auto-registered). Mounts GET /api/site-builder/templates* so template picker is live on founder lane.

CONDUCTOR-GLUE SENTRY pre-alpha Layer B (human-sim). Mounts POST /api/v1/sites/prealpha/layer-b — drives the live editor with a real browser like a client (loads editor, verifies canvas iframe shows the REAL site not 'Cannot GET', switches a template, types in the AI chat, clicks Save with no edits, checks the publish path), captures screenshots into /previews/<id>/_sentry/, and asks a cheap model to critique the UX + propose improvements. Fails closed. Mounted in the founder lane so it runs on prod where Chrome launches. Pairs with Layer A (scripts/run-site-builder-prealpha.mjs); no feature is 'done' until both pass.

CONDUCTOR-GLUE separation-of-powers switch. Mounts GET /api/v1/factory/governance/fence + POST .../fence/enable so the SYSTEM can turn its own governance fence ON (GOVERNED_FACTORY_ONLY=1) via Railway API + self-redeploy, but is physically unable to turn it OFF (enable-only ratchet — only a human in Railway can). PR #272 added the guard; this mounts the live surface that was missing so the flip can actually happen. Chair receipt LIFERE_COUNCIL_1783462353983.

General browser agent + founder-authorized signup (POST /api/v1/browser-agent/run|signup|signup/sync|signup/approve). founder_authority:true completes paid checkout from FOUNDER_PAYMENT_* Railway vault; without it, stops at consent.
Managed accounts vault + recipe signups at /api/v1/accounts/* on founder lane.

MarketingOS SocialMediaOS Phase 1 JSON API (§6). The autonomous loop rebuilds this file (re-queued mos-session-routes); once deployed the boot mounts it here and the functional-proof gate verifies /api/v1/marketing/* is LIVE before the step can be done. Records a benign 'module not found' health error until the loop ships the file — fail-open, never blocks boot.
MarketingOS SocialMediaOS Phase 1 SSR screens (§5). Rebuilt by the loop (re-queued mos-session-ui); mounted here so module-health proves the /marketing pages load LIVE.

MarketingOS Phase 2 calendar/atoms JSON API (§5 Phase 2). Built by the loop (queued mos-phase2-routes); once deployed the boot mounts it and the functional-proof gate verifies /api/v1/marketing/calendar + /atoms are LIVE before the step can be done. Records a benign 'module not found' health error until the loop ships the file — fail-open, never blocks boot.
MarketingOS Phase 2 SSR content-calendar + atom-library screens (§5 Phase 2). Built by the loop (queued mos-phase2-ui); mounted here so module-health proves /marketing/calendar loads LIVE.

SocialMediaOS Content Intelligence API (Priority Ideas subset). Built by the loop (queued smos-intel-routes); imports the four intel services (title-universe, script-scorer, publish-gate, repurpose) and exposes /api/v1/marketing/intel/*. Mounted here so the functional-proof gate verifies the endpoints are LIVE before the step can be done. Records a benign 'module not found' health error until the loop ships the file — fail-open, never blocks boot.

LifeOS Phase 2 REST surface. Was blocked forever because s07 (auto-register) depended on s06 while s06 failed module-health for missing auto-register — chicken-egg. Mounted here so functional-proof can pass and the loop can finish Phase 2.

LifeOS Phase 3 REST (habits/energy/learning/calendar-protection). s7 blocked on missing auto-register after builder wrote broken sN-*-service imports — conductor GAP-FILL rewired to real lifeos-* services + mounted here.

TC Service intake run + runs list. s10 false-done had reused an unrelated LifeOS auto-register commit; conductor GAP-FILL adds the real entries so module-health can pass. Disabled 2026-07-10: superseded by camelCase .mjs queue targets (step-08/09) to avoid double-mount.

TC Service billing checkout/enroll/webhook. Mounted via auto-register for founder-lane module-health. Disabled 2026-07-10: superseded by camelCase .mjs queue targets (step-08/09) to avoid double-mount.
TC Service IMAP status + dry-run. Mounted via auto-register for founder-lane module-health.
TC Service step-08 intake/document-QA/offer-prep/approvals/showing-feedback. GAP-FILL after builder syntax/default-import failures.
TC Service step-09 billing subscribe/webhook/status. Auto-register required for module-health (built but unreachable = false done).

BuilderOS mission runtime API at /api/missions*. GAP-FILL: step-04 was built but unreachable (createMissionRoutes, never auto-registered) — never-stop spun. Mounted here so module-health can prove LIVE and the queue can advance.
Creative Engine shared render API at /api/v1/creative/* — footage_edit, photo_polish, script_compose, generative_broll. Auto-registered so founder lane mounts without composition-root edit.
Creative Engine SSR studio at /creative and /creative/studio.

Real AI graphic-design generation (Ideogram/Recraft/Flux via Replicate) at /api/v1/creative/graphic-design/{estimate,render} — governed-built 2026-07-14 for SocialMediaOS thumbnails + Site Builder hero/brand imagery. Stateless v1 (no DB job persistence); the shared services/creative-engine/index.js dispatcher is Zone-3 (>150 lines) so this is a dedicated route pair rather than an edit to that file. Gated on REPLICATE_API_TOKEN — NOT YET SET on Railway as of this note (GET /api/v1/creative/health reports replicateConfigured:false); render returns 503 until the founder adds the token.
Phase 5 social publish API — enabled 2026-07-12 for money path (LIVE_SOCIAL_PUBLISH_ENABLED + approval gate still required for live posts).

MarketingOS Phase 6 YouTube connect flow — ONE shared Google OAuth app (reuses GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET already live for Calendar), per-client one-time consent via Google's own real login page. Exposes GET /api/v1/marketing/youtube/connect (redirect to Google), GET /.../callback (token exchange, stored in the existing user_integrations table under provider 'youtube_channel'), GET /.../status. Built by the loop (queued mos-youtube-connect-routes); mounted here so the functional-proof gate verifies the endpoints are LIVE before the step can be done. Records a benign 'module not found' health error until the loop ships the file — fail-open, never blocks boot.
LifeOS consent grant/revoke/status. GAP-FILL: builder route was unreachable without auto-register; chicken-egg with functional-proof gate.
LifeOS biological age REST surface. Auto-register entry added so the governed factory can ship the route and module-health can prove it LIVE.
LifeOS digital-twin simulator REST surface. Auto-register entry added so the governed factory can ship the route and module-health can prove it LIVE.
LifeOS member feedback REST surface. Auto-register entry added so the governed factory can ship the route and module-health can prove it LIVE.
LifeOS Perfect Day REST surface: plan, rate, re-prioritize, and ADD-style reminders. Auto-register entry added so the governed factory can ship the route and module-health can prove it LIVE.

GAP-FILL: built (BUILD_QUEUE mos-session-export/mos-r2-upload) but never auto-registered, so it stayed unreachable through 3 verify attempts. Also fixed on the same pass: the route's own local buildSessionExport/uploadAudioToR2 reimplementations never called the real services/marketing-session-export.js and services/marketing-r2-upload.js built alongside them in the same session (the R2 upload path asked an AI council member to fabricate a URL instead of doing a real S3/R2 PutObject), and the auth check used req.session.userId even though this codebase has no express-session middleware anywhere, so it would 401 every request unconditionally. Swapped to deps.requireKey, the pattern every other auto-registered route already uses.
